steps.title: Isolate the term with p
steps.content:
Subtract 55 from both sides of the equation.
$$10p + 55 = 375$$
$$10p + 55 - 55 = 375 - 55$$
$$10p = 320$$

steps.title: Solve for p
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 10 to isolate $p$.
$$\frac{10p}{10} = \frac{320}{10}$$
$$p = 32$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
